Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "\\$f = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\wp-content\\themes\\smart-argentina\\assets\\video' -Filter *.mp4 | Select-Object -First 1; if \(\\$f\) { try { \\$r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \(\\"http://localhost/wp-content/themes/smart-argentina/assets/video/\\" + \\$f.Name\) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \('STATUS ' + \\$r.StatusCode + ' Content-Type=' + \\$r.Headers['Content-Type']\) } catch { Write-Output \('ERROR: ' + \\$_.Exception.Message\) } } else { Write-Output 'no mp4 found' }")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "try { \\$r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \('STATUS ' + \\$r.StatusCode\); \\$html = \\$r.Content; if \(\\$html -match 'THEME_URL'\) { Write-Output 'THEME_URL ENCONTRADO EN HTML' } else { Write-Output 'THEME_URL NO ENCONTRADO EN HTML' }; \\$idx = \\$html.IndexOf\('main.js'\); if \(\\$idx -ge 0\) { Write-Output \('contexto main.js: ' + \\$html.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,\\$idx-80\), 160\)\) } else { Write-Output 'main.js no referenciado' } } catch { Write-Output \('ERROR: ' + \\$_.Exception.Message\) }")
